title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses DeepSeek V4, highlighting the model's significant reduction in inference costs and compute demand. The analysis frames V4 within the broader open versus closed lab competition, emphasizing how the model demonstrates LLMs becoming more efficient and how different incentive structures between nations influence AI development.
